name: Cinnamon-Raisin Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the bread into 1-inch cubes.
2. Place the diced bread in a 9x13-inch baking dish and toss with 2 cups of milk. Let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Mix the remaining milk and pudding until smooth. Pour over the soaked bread and toss lightly.
4. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until browned and set almost all of the way into the middle.
5. Cool for 15 minutes before serving. Serve warm with ice cream, or chilled.
